{"verdict":"approve","summary":"The new declarations are placed in natural homes for their dependency level: generic homeomorphism-action instances under `TauCeti.Topology.Algebra`, and the roadmap-facing deck transformation subgroup under `TauCeti.AlgebraicTopology.UniversalCover`. The imports are direct and topic-specific rather than broad.","findings":[]}

verdict_obj.summary: The new declarations are placed in natural homes for their dependency level: generic homeomorphism-action instances under `TauCeti.Topology.Algebra`, and the roadmap-facing deck transformation subgroup under `TauCeti.AlgebraicTopology.UniversalCover`. The imports are direct and topic-specific rather than broad.
